name: Hierarchy — Multi-Site Clinical Trial Organization with 12 nodes
input: Show a multi-site clinical trial organizational hierarchy. Sponsor at top. Under Sponsor: Global Medical Monitor, Contract Research Organization (CRO). Under CRO: Data Management, Biostatistics, Regulatory Affairs. Under Global Medical Monitor: Regional Lead Americas, Regional Lead EMEA, Regional Lead APAC. Under Regional Lead Americas: Site 1 Boston, Site 2 Houston.
qualityCriteria: Items present (Sponsor, Medical Monitor, CRO, Data Management, Biostatistics, Regulatory, Americas, EMEA, APAC, Boston, Houston)
Description for each item is present
No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: Multi-level org chart tree with 4 depth levels showing sponsor hierarchy down to individual sites.

data.title: Multi-Site Clinical Trial Organization

items.label: Sponsor
items.description: Pharmaceutical company funding and overseeing the clinical program

items.label: Global Medical Monitor
items.description: Physician responsible for medical oversight across all regions

items.label: Contract Research Organization
items.description: CRO managing operational execution of the trial

items.label: Data Management
items.description: Electronic data capture, query resolution, database lock

items.label: Biostatistics
items.description: Statistical analysis plan, interim analyses, final report

items.label: Regulatory Affairs
items.description: IND/CTA submissions, safety reporting, regulatory compliance

items.label: Regional Lead Americas
items.description: Oversees North and South American trial sites

items.label: Regional Lead EMEA
items.description: Oversees European and Middle Eastern trial sites

items.label: Site 1 — Boston
items.description: Massachusetts General Hospital principal investigator site

items.label: Site 2 — Houston
items.description: MD Anderson Cancer Center principal investigator site

data.caption: Clinical trial organizational structure from sponsor to individual sites
